# PING(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  ping — send ICMP echo requests to test connectivity

## SYNOPSIS
  ping [-c count] <host>

## DESCRIPTION
Tests network connectivity to a host by sending ICMP echo packets.

## OPTIONS
  -c count  Number of packets to send (default 4, max 4)

## EXAMPLES
  ping nexus.corp
  ping -c 3 chimera-control
  ping 10.0.1.100

## SEE ALSO
  traceroute, nmap, nc, scan
